versions.version_description: It has no capo, and it's the way that Paramore's guitarist (Taylor York) plays it live and in studio.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Tuning: standard with capo on 2nd

ALternatively, you can play barre chords like so without the capo
The real version is played without a capo and using barre chords

[tab]              [ch]B[/ch]   [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]Emaj7[/ch] [ch]Asus2/F#[/ch] [ch]C#m[/ch]  [ch]F#[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
           e|-7----9-----7------0------4---2---0---|
           B|-7----10----9------0------5---2---0---|
           G|-8----11----8------2------6---3---1---|
           D|-9----11----9------2------6---4---2---|
           A|-9----9-----7------0------4---4---2---|
           E|-7----9-----7------2------4---2---0---|[/tab]
In place of:  [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]


[Intro]
[ch]A[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]  x2


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                                 [ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
When I was younger I saw my daddy cry and curse at the wind.[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]A[/ch]                                                [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
He broke his own heart and I watched as he tried to re-assemble it.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]                                       [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
And my mamma swore she that would never let herself forget.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]                                                  [ch]Em[/ch]
And that was the day that I promised I'd never sing of love if it does not[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
exist. But darling..[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
You are the only exception[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
You are the only exception[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
You are the only exception[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
You are the only exception[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]                                   [ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
Maybe I know somewhere deep in my soul that love never lasts.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]                                        [ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
And we've got to find other ways to make it alone or keep a straight face.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]                                      [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
And I've always lived like this keeping a comfortable, distance.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]                                              [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
And up until now I had sworn to myself that I'm content with loneliness,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]
'cause none of it was ever worth the risk.[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]
Well you are the only exception[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
You are the only exception[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
You are the only exception[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
You are the only exception[/tab]


[Bridge]
[ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]   x2

[tab]           [ch]Bm[/ch]
I've got a tight grip on reality,[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]A[/ch]                           [ch]E[/ch]
But I can't let go of what's in front of me here.[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]
I know you're leaving in the morning when you wake up,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]                                  [ch]E[/ch]
Leave me with some kind of proof it's not a dream.[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]
whoa[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
You are the only exception[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
You are the only exception[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
You are the only exception[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
You are the only exception[/tab]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]
You are the only exception[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
You are the only exception[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
You are the only exception[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
You are the only exception[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
And I'm on my way to believing[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
Oh, and I'm on my way to believing[/tab]
